---
name: P2 Issue Template
about: Matches Herring's Requirements
title: 630:P2 [ChatGPT] Issue description...
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Smell Summary (1-3 Sentences)



## 2. Location (File paths, class/module/function names)



## 3. Tool Evidence

*SonarQube: rule name/key, severity, link/screenshot reference (if possible)*
*ChatGPT: the prompt summary and the model’s conclusion (briefly paraphrased)*


## 4. Why this matters (Maintenance Impact)

*Readability, change risk, regression risk, coupling testability, etc.*


## 5. Acceptance Criteria (Bullet List)

*Written as observable outcomes*
*Avoid "refactor it" as a criterion; be specific*

* Example Criterion


## 6. Non-goals / Constraints

*"No behavior change intended" (unless explicitly needed)*
*"Limit scope to module X"*


## 7. Suggested Verification Approach

*What to check after refactor (tests passing, manual UI flow, etc.)*


## 8. Estimated Scope

*Small / Medium / Large (and WHY)*
